title: Helpers--Carpenters
description: Help carpenters by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include using, supplying, or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.text: Clean work areas, machines, or equipment, to maintain a clean and safe job site.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fasten timbers or lumber with glue, screws, pegs, or nails and install hardware.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform tie spacing layout and measure, mark, drill or cut.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select tools, equipment, or materials from storage and transport items to work site.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drill holes in timbers or lumber.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut timbers, lumber, or paneling to specified dimensions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and hold timbers, lumber, or paneling in place for fastening or cutting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align, straighten, plumb, or square forms for installation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hold plumb bobs, sighting rods, or other equipment to aid in establishing reference points and lines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct forms and assist in raising them to the required elevation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install handrails under the direction of a carpenter.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Glue and clamp edges or joints of assembled parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Smooth or sand surfaces to remove ridges, tool marks, glue, or caulking.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Secure stakes to grids for constructions of footings, nail scabs to footing forms, and vibrate and float concrete.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut and install insulating or sound-absorbing material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut tile or linoleum to fit and spread adhesives on flooring for installation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cover surfaces with laminated plastic covering material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
